ensemble.note: Validated on both halves of the holdout independently (split-holdout consistency check). Includes candlestick/wick-based strategies. Best credible candidate as of 2026-07-02, supersedes the earlier RSI+Stochastic-only ensemble.
ensemble.engine_override_note: A 15-H4-bar time stop improves every holdout metric over the no-time-stop baseline (return +6.63%->+6.91%, Sharpe 1.79->1.87, Calmar 3.36->3.52, same ~3.8% max drawdown) and stays consistent on both holdout halves. Checked across bars=13..16, not a single lucky value. See scripts/test_friend_filters.py. Not yet wired into run_backtest.py/run_live.py's BacktestConfig defaults -- pass it explicitly (BacktestConfig(max_hold_bars=15)) until it is.
